html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

Skewered Puffs is a Food Item that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets.

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"yotr_food4"
“Bunny-hop right into my mouth!”
–Wilson
“I'll just pop those in my mouth, quick as a bunny.”
–Willow
“Sticky chew puffs.”
–Wolfgang
“It's sticky.”
–Wendy
“SWEET EMPTY CALORIES”
–WX-78
“Cakes on a stick, what next?”
–Wickerbottom
“I'll save the stick for a little midnight snack.”
–Woodie
“Far too sticky for my liking.”
–Maxwell
“A triö öf tasty mörsels.”
–Wigfrid
“We can eat one puff, and share the rest with our friends!”
–Webber
“Perfectly doughy.”
–Warly
“Squishy”
–Wormwood
“Sweetness on a stick.”
–Winona
“This doughy treat, I will not eat.”
–Wortox
“Not sharing!”
–Wurt
“They're not marshmallows, but they're still pretty good!”
–Walter
“What could be better than food on a stick?”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bánh Puffered là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm có thể kiếm được tại Đền Bunnyman với giá 5 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn.
